title: Fleet anti-pattern: $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR in hook commands silently broken across 16/18 spokes
signal: 16/18 spokes had silently broken hooks ($CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR never resolved by CC). Health check passed falsely. Fixed: env-var detection + Tender auto-heal. Fleet remediated in 5 seconds.
rationale: Silent failures across entire fleet. Health check was lying. Assertion-based verification pattern established.
